productDisplayName: Numero Uno Men Casual White Shoes
description: shoes from numero uno are made with the fine materials crafted in India. This perforated sneaker from NU is an example of the brand's excellent craftsmanship. The softly designed upper and efficient grooves on the sole showcase the brand's versatile power in innovating. With its classic design, this shoe makes for a stylish and comfortable everyday wear as well. Upper Synthetic leather upper wirh reinforced overlay on the heel collar for support Perforations on the midfoot for ventilation Contrast midfoot overlay riveted to the upper Central lace-ups with a branded tongue Mesh fabric lining Removable, padded sockliner to accomodate an orthotic Midsole EVA midsole with PU foxing Outsole Herringbone grooves on the PU outsole Shoe care Wipe synthetic leather surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash Do not store in direct sunlight
